title: Simple Ping
description: The Simple Ping plugin allows players to check there current ping to the server!
body:
📶  Simple Ping – Simple Minecraft Ping Checker Plugin

Keep your players informed with their current Ping, a lightweight and efficient plugin that allows players to check their current ping with just a simple command!

✨ Features:

- Displays player ping using /ping

- Instant feedback with no lag or performance impact

- Works seamlessly on 1.16+ Spigot servers

- Great for server diagnostics and player connection awareness

📦 Usage:
Just type /ping in chat and see your current ping in milliseconds!

🛠️ Perfect For:

- Survival, minigame, or PvP servers

- GUI integrations

- Network or server performance awareness


**Config file**
```
# Color codes using & symbol
# Hex support soon
# Made by MegaT3ch
# Contributors: Artsign

# The Permission Node
permission: 'simpleping.use'

# Plugin Messages
fail-message: '&cCommand execution failed. This command can not be run by the console'
no-permission-message: '&cYou do not have the required permission'
ping-message: '&aYour ping is {PING}ms'
```
